title: Speaking Device
description: This mod converts chat messages into speech in real-time using the ElevenLabs API. It features a voice selection menu to choose your preferred AI voice.
body:
# 🎙️ Speaking Device

### 🔊 Vocal Synthesis Protocol
The system activates as soon as you equip the **Speaking Device**. Powered by the **ElevenLabs API**, every message you type in chat is instantly transformed into high-quality, natural speech.

### 🎭 Voice Selection Interface
Find the perfect tone for your character. Choose from various AI voices within the mod to personalize your communication style.

---

## 🛠️ Controls

| Action | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Equip Item** | Enables the system and starts the text-to-speech protocol. |
| **V Key** | Opens the voice selection menu to switch between different voices. |

---
**Lead Developer:** `Shady1545`
**Helper:** `robotic1545`
